creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to DYM from comment #0)

This port uses flavor now. It's the same as ImageMagick7 in ports 2a68fe27dc3dfef09d780ac4c4a378f7e46dc149. Therefore, you cannot use OPTION_SET/UNSET here. net/mtr@nox11 is what you want.

(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #1)

> Some ports like net/wireshark do however provide menu options for it (not called X11 however).

IIUC, the FLAVOR handler (line 48-51) is to adjust COMMENT and exclude some options (GUI and RTP). There is no menu option to enable/disable FLAVOR.

(In reply to DYM from comment #3)

I don't see the need for this option. It just makes thing more complicated.
